## beehiiv polls list

List polls <Badge intent="info" minimal outlined>OAuth Scope: polls:read</Badge>

### Synopsis

List polls <Badge intent="info" minimal outlined>OAuth Scope: polls:read</Badge>

Retrieve all polls belonging to a specific publication. Poll choices are always included. Use `expand[]=stats` to include aggregate vote counts per choice.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/polls

```
beehiiv polls list [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --all                 Fetch every page and aggregate the results
  -h, --help                help for list
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```

      --api-key string          Override the Beehiiv API key
      --base-url string         Override the API base URL

      --publication-id string   Override the Beehiiv publication ID
      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit
      --raw                     Shorthand for --output raw
      --table                   Shorthand for --output table
      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
      --verbose                 Print request and response details to stderr
